# Support for Agent Skills

Thanks for using Agent Skills! Here's how to get help:

## Getting Help

- **Issues**: Report bugs or request features [on GitHub](https://github.com/kylebrodeur/agent-skills/issues)
- **Discussions**: Ask questions and share ideas [on GitHub Discussions](https://github.com/kylebrodeur/agent-skills/discussions)
- **Docs**: Check the [README](../README.md) for installation and usage

## Getting Help with Claude Code

- [Claude Code Docs](https://docs.claude.ai/)
- [Claude Code Community](https:// claude.ai/chat/community)

## Getting Help with GitHub Copilot

- [Copilot Docs](https://docs.github.com/en/copilot)
- [Copilot Community](https://github.com/orgs/community/discussions/categories/copilot)
